code: import{useMemo,useState}from'react';import Product from'../components/Product';import books from'../product_list';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs,Fragment as _Fragment}from"react/jsx-runtime";const HomeScreen=()=>{const[category,setCategory]=useState('Sve');const[query,setQuery]=useState('');const categories=['Sve',...new Set(books.map(book=>book.category))];const filteredBooks=useMemo(()=>books.filter(book=>{const byCategory=category==='Sve'||book.category===category;const byQuery=`${book.name} ${book.author} ${book.city}`.toLowerCase().includes(query.toLowerCase());return byCategory&&byQuery;}),[category,query]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(_Fragment,{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("section",{className:"hero",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{children:"Pronadji knjigu koja je vec prosla kroz necije omiljene stranice."})})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"toolbar",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Nove knjige"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"filters-row",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"search",placeholder:"Pretraga knjiga",value:query,onChange:event=>setQuery(event.target.value)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("select",{value:category,onChange:event=>setCategory(event.target.value),children:categories.map(item=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("option",{children:item},item))})]})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("section",{className:"product-grid",children:filteredBooks.map(book=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Product,{book:book},book.id))})]});};export default HomeScreen;
